title: SFN delta robustness pass-4 in spec
description: Claimed as follow-up to project-LICHEN-5pvm. Fix SFN delta calculation robustness per RFC 1982, add explicit Python semantics, update all test vector cross-refs (sfn-delta.json does not exist; use ccp16-desync.json desync_on_sfn_wrap and ccp_load_balancing.json), improve IETF normative language. After every logical chunk of edits to spec/02a-coordinated-capacity.md run codereview 3x by filing beads tagged 'codereview'. Fix ALL findings P0-P4 as real work. Do not close main bead until 3 consecutive clean review passes with no new findings. End with bd ready | head -5. Parent: project-LICHEN-5pvm
